task_completion.description: Navigate to the software or license management section of the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main software asset management dashboard or list view showing available software licenses.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the specific target license for auditing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific details, management, or edit page for the 'Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps' license.

task_completion.description: Revoke seats from users in unauthorized departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Action menus, confirmation dialogs, or unchecking boxes indicating the removal of users belonging to the 'Sales', 'Finance', or 'HR' departments from the license.

task_completion.description: Provision seats to users in authorized departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Action menus, selection dialogs, or checking boxes indicating the addition of users belonging to the 'Creative' and 'Marketing' departments to the license.

task_completion.description: Ensure the total assigned seats do not exceed the license limit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The license details or summary page showing the 'seats used' or 'assigned seats' is a maximum of 10.

task_completion.description: Confirm the final list of assigned users only contains authorized departments.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A final view of the assigned users list for the license, confirming that only users from the 'Creative' and 'Marketing' departments are present.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface to manage licenses.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, dropdown selections, and navigation within the application GUI, rather than terminal windows executing commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual software asset management application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a typical software asset management tool (e.g., a web application like Snipe-IT or Odoo), not a text editor or a static mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not use scripts or direct database manipulation to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of database client windows, API testing tools, or terminal windows running Python/Bash scripts to bulk-update the system.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target License: 'Adobe Creative Cloud All Apps'. Authorized Departments (must have seats): 'Creative', 'Marketing'. Unauthorized Departments (must NOT have seats): 'Sales', 'Finance', 'HR'. Expected total seats: 10.
